title: stelis calothece
intro: Stelis calothece is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its unique and delicate appearance. The medicinal properties of Stelis calothece include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antiviral activity. Herbal preparations of Stelis calothece can be made by infusing the plant in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
